message:
chore(ci): regenerate certification artifacts after ext_must_pass gate promotion

The ext_must_pass gate (bd-1f42.4.4) previously showed SKIP because
the must_pass_gate_verdict.json artifact was missing from the expected
path. With the conformance test now properly generating the artifact,
the gate promotes to PASS.

Impact on certification verdict:
- Overall: FAIL → PASS (15/15 gates passing, 9/9 blocking pass)
- can_promote: false → true
- ext_must_pass: SKIP → PASS in both preflight and full lanes
- Timestamps updated to 2026-02-17T03:25:22Z (full) and
  2026-02-17T03:16:20Z (preflight)

All artifacts regenerated:
- certification_events.jsonl (event timestamps)
- certification_report.md (summary table, verdict)
- certification_verdict.json (gate statuses, promotion rules)
- preflight_verdict.json (blocking gate counts)
- waiver_audit.json (timestamp only, no waiver changes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,29 +1,29 @@
 # Full Certification Report
 
-> Generated: 2026-02-16T23:05:57Z
+> Generated: 2026-02-17T03:25:22Z
 > Lane: **full**
-> Verdict: **FAIL**
+> Verdict: **PASS**
 
 ## Summary
 
 | Metric | Value |
 |--------|-------|
 | Total gates | 15 |
-| Passed | 14 |
+| Passed | 15 |
 | Failed | 0 |
 | Warned | 0 |
-| Skipped | 1 |
+| Skipped | 0 |
 | Waived | 0 |
-| Blocking | 8/9 |
-| Can promote | NO |
+| Blocking | 9/9 |
+| Can promote | YES |
 
 ## Gate Results
 
 | Gate | Bead | Blocking | Status | Waived | Artifact |
 |------|------|----------|--------|--------|----------|
 | Non-mock unit compliance | bd-1f42.2.6 | YES | PASS | - | `docs/non-mock-rubric.json` |
 | E2E log contract and transcripts | bd-1f42.3.6 | no | PASS | - | `tests/e2e_results` |
-| Extension must-pass gate (208 extensions) | bd-1f42.4.4 | YES | SKIP | - | `tests/ext_conformance/reports/gate/must_pass_gate_verdict.json` |
+| Extension must-pass gate (208 extensions) | bd-1f42.4.4 | YES | PASS | - | `tests/ext_conformance/reports/gate/must_pass_gate_verdict.json` |
 | Extension provider compatibility matrix | bd-1f42.4.6 | no | PASS | - | `tests/ext_conformance/reports/provider_compat/provider_compat_report.json` |
 | Unified evidence bundle | bd-1f42.6.8 | no | PASS | - | `tests/evidence_bundle/index.json` |
 | Cross-platform matrix validation | bd-1f42.6.7 | YES | PASS | - | `tests/cross_platform_reports/linux/platform_report.json` |
